title: The Tamil Language Movement and Aladi Aruna’s "Hindi Imperialism": Linguistic Resistance and Identity
further_info: Recommended Reading Aruna, Aladi. 2017. Inti ēkātipattiyam / Ālaṭi Aruṇā. Mutaṟpatippu. Ceṉṉai: Vikaṭaṉ Piracuram. Aladi Aruna: Hindi imperialism / Aladi Aruna ; translated by R. Vijaya Sankar ; with forewords by C.N. Annadurai, M. Karunanidhi and … . - New Delhi: Speaking Tiger, 2024. > Note: These two will serve as our core comparative texts. Further Reading: Ramaswamy, Sumathi. Passions of the Tongue: Language Devotion in Tamil India, 1891–1970. University of California Press, 1997. Hardgrave, Robert L. The Dravidian Movement. Popular Prakashan, 1965.
